mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_owner (community_id, house_no, phone_number, id_card_last4, real_name, status, account_status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{houseNo}, #{phoneNumber}, #{idCardLast4}, #{realName}, #{status}, #{accountStatus}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, community_id, house_no, phone_number, id_card_last4, real_name, status, reject_reason, audit_admin_id, audit_time, account_status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time FROM sys_owner WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, community_id, house_no, phone_number, id_card_last4, real_name, status, reject_reason, audit_admin_id, audit_time, account_status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time FROM sys_owner WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, community_id, house_no, phone_number, id_card_last4, real_name, status, reject_reason, audit_admin_id, audit_time, account_status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time FROM sys_owner WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber} AND community_id = #{communityId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_owner SET account_status = #{accountStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_owner SET phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_owner SET real_name = #{realName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_owner SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, audit_admin_id = #{auditAdminId}, audit_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
